nodes.name: Every 6 Hours
nodes.notes: Runs every 6 hours. Adjust interval as needed.

nodes.name: Load Sync State
nodes.notes: Reads lastSyncDate and synced IDs from n8n's workflow static data. First run returns null (no date filter = fetch all history).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `query ListTranscripts($limit: Int, $skip: Int, $fromDate: DateTime, $toDate: DateTime) { transcripts(limit: $limit, skip: $skip, fromDate: $fromDate, toDate: $toDate) { id title date dateString duration organizer_email calendar_id participants speakers { id name } meeting_attendees { displayName name email } } }`, variables: { limit: $json.batchSize || 50, skip: 0, fromDate: $json.lastSyncDate || undefined, toDate: $json.endDate || undefined } }) }}

nodes.name: List Fireflies Transcripts
nodes.notes: Fetches up to 50 transcripts from Fireflies. On first run (no lastSyncDate), returns oldest transcripts first — backfill happens naturally over multiple runs.

nodes.name: Filter Already Synced
nodes.notes: Checks workflow static data for previously synced IDs. Filters them out and formats each transcript as a separate item.

nodes.name: Has New Transcripts?
nodes.notes: Skips the rest of the workflow if there are no new transcripts to process.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `query GetTranscript($id: String!) { transcript(id: $id) { id title date dateString duration organizer_email host_email calendar_id transcript_url speakers { id name } meeting_attendees { displayName name email } sentences { index speaker_name speaker_id text raw_text start_time end_time } summary { overview action_items keywords } } }`, variables: { id: $json.id } }) }}

nodes.name: Fetch Full Transcript
nodes.notes: Fetches the full transcript with sentences and attendees. Rate-limited to ~1 req/sec to stay within Fireflies limits.

nodes.name: Convert to Clarify Format
nodes.notes: Converts Fireflies sentences (speaker-level, seconds) to Clarify transcript format (word-level, seconds). Groups consecutive sentences by speaker.

nodes.name: Has Sentences?
nodes.notes: Skips transcripts with no sentence content (failed recordings, still processing, etc.)

nodes.name: Find or Create Meeting
nodes.notes: Searches Clarify for an existing meeting by time proximity (40pts), title similarity (40pts), and participant overlap (30pts). Minimum 60 pts + 2 signals to match. Creates a new ad-hoc meeting if no match found.

nodes.name: Upload Transcript
nodes.notes: Uploads the converted transcript to the newly created meeting.

nodes.name: Resolve & Link People
nodes.notes: For each attendee email: search for existing Person → create if not found → PATCH /relationships/people to link to meeting. This is required because the generic records API doesn't auto-resolve participants.

nodes.name: Update Sync State
nodes.notes: Saves synced transcript IDs and last sync timestamp to n8n's workflow static data. Caps at 10k IDs to prevent unbounded growth.

nodes.name: Mark Skipped as Synced
nodes.notes: Marks transcripts with no content as synced so they aren't retried.

nodes.name: Nothing to Sync
nodes.notes: No new transcripts — workflow ends here.
